description: Dell Storage Integration Tools for VMware (DSITV) 06.01.00.016 contain an information disclosure vulnerability. A local low-privileged malicious user could potentially exploit this vulnerability to retrieve an encryption key that could aid in further attacks.

product.name: Dell Storage Integration Tools for VMware (DSITV), Dell Storage vSphere Client Plugin (DSVCP), Replay Manager for VMware (RMSV)

enisaIdProduct.product_version: Versions prior to 6.1.1, Versions prior to 3.1.2
